definition: Case or operating-point identifier.
sign_or_reference_convention: Preserve existing split role and provenance labels.

definition: Physical span or feature region such as upcomer aggregate or corner_lower_right.
sign_or_reference_convention: Use canonical segment/feature names from current maps.

definition: Selected reduced-model mode from switching_model_selection_contract.csv.
sign_or_reference_convention: One of one_stream_developing; signed_flow_junction_network; throughflow_recirc_exchange_cell; diagnostic_only.

definition: Net throughflow mass flow carried by the main 1D path.
sign_or_reference_convention: Positive in canonical loop direction; solved at runtime
admission_status: existing 1D state plus CFD diagnostic comparison

definition: Main-stream inlet bulk temperature for the modeled region.
sign_or_reference_convention: Use enthalpy-weighted or signed-mass bulk basis only when recirculation gate allows; otherwise carry basis label.

definition: Main-stream outlet bulk temperature for the modeled region.
sign_or_reference_convention: Same temperature basis and time window as T_main_in.

definition: Mechanical pressure node entering the modeled region.
sign_or_reference_convention: Use hydrostatic-checked p_rgh basis when pressure residual is scored.

definition: Mechanical pressure node exiting the modeled region.
sign_or_reference_convention: Downstream-minus-upstream residual convention must be carried explicitly.

definition: mu_recirc_ref divided by mu_main_ref for the same property package and time window.
sign_or_reference_convention: Reference temperatures are T_recirc and local T_main_exchange unless a later row admits another basis.

definition: rho_recirc_ref divided by rho_main_ref for the same property package and time window.
sign_or_reference_convention: Reference temperatures are T_recirc and local T_main_exchange unless a later row admits another basis.

definition: Coherent recirculating volume assigned to the reduced cell.
sign_or_reference_convention: Must come from an explicit CFD volume/region mask
source_or_status: not inferred from a coefficient residual.

definition: Bidirectional exchange mass-flow magnitude between the main stream and recirculation cell.
sign_or_reference_convention: Positive magnitude; equal and opposite exchange terms preserve total mass at steady state.

definition: Bulk recirculation-cell temperature.
sign_or_reference_convention: Must be defined from a cell/volume mask and property mode; not the same as single signed mixing-cup T when cancellation is material.

definition: Residence time rho_recirc * V_recirc / mdot_exchange.
sign_or_reference_convention: Return diagnostic_missing_or_near_zero_denominator instead of extreme values when mdot_exchange is missing or near zero.
source_or_status: derived after V_recirc and mdot_exchange exist

definition: Reverse area fraction on the same-window cut plane or region boundary.
sign_or_reference_convention: Use the local canonical throughflow normal and preserve plane IDs.

definition: Reverse mass fraction on the same-window cut plane or region boundary.
sign_or_reference_convention: Use mass-flux magnitude basis and preserve plane IDs.

definition: Secondary velocity fraction or surrogate secondary-flow metric.
sign_or_reference_convention: Use same-window velocity field and report missing when unavailable.
